datasets.name: w1_nation_profile
queryLines:
SELECT
  label,
  profile,
  sort_order,
  nation_id,
  nation_name_display,
  load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_profile_long
ORDER BY sort_order

datasets.name: w2_nation_members_over_time
queryLines:
SELECT
  iso_week,
  cumulative_coaches,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_members_cumulative_weekly_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  OR array_contains(:compare_nations, nation_name_display)
ORDER BY iso_week, nation_name_display

datasets.name: w3_glo_boxplot
queryLines:
SELECT
  nation_name_display,
  metric_type,
  metric_value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_coach_glo_metrics_long
WHERE metric_type = :glo_metric_type
  AND (
    nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    OR array_contains(:compare_nations, nation_name_display)
    OR nation_name_display = 'World'
  )

datasets.name: w4_elo_boxplot
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    nd.nation_name_display,
    ncrp.coach_id,
    ncrp.elo_peak AS peak_elo
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_coach_race_elo_peak ncrp
  JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.nation_dim nd
    ON ncrp.nation_id = nd.nation_id
  JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.race_dim rd
    ON ncrp.race_id = rd.race_id
  WHERE array_contains(:race_name, rd.race_name)
    AND ncrp.elo_peak IS NOT NULL
),
world_data AS (
  SELECT
    'World' AS nation_label,
    coach_id,
    peak_elo
  FROM base
),
selected AS (
  SELECT
    nation_name_display AS nation_label,
    coach_id,
    peak_elo
  FROM base
  WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
),
comparisons AS (
  SELECT
    nation_name_display AS nation_label,
    coach_id,
    peak_elo
  FROM base
  WHERE array_contains(coalesce(:compare_nations, array()), nation_name_display)
    AND nation_name_display <> :nation_name_display
)
SELECT * FROM world_data
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM selected
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM comparisons
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN nation_label = 'World' THEN 0
        WHEN nation_label = :nation_name_display THEN 1
    ELSE 2
  END,
  nation_label

datasets.name: w5_glo_histogram
queryLines:
SELECT
  glo_bin_label,
  density_pct,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_glo_binned_distribution_display
WHERE metric_type = :glo_metric
  AND (
    nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    OR array_contains(:compare_nations, nation_name_display)
    OR nation_id = 0
  )
ORDER BY glo_bin, nation_name_display

datasets.name: w6_glo_cumulative
queryLines:
SELECT
  glo_bin_label,
  cumulative_density_pct,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_glo_binned_distribution_display
WHERE metric_type = :glo_metric
  AND (
    nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
    OR array_contains(:compare_nations, nation_name_display)
    OR nation_id = 0
  )
ORDER BY glo_bin, nation_name_display

datasets.name: w7_race_popularity
queryLines:
SELECT
  race_name,
  coaches_pct_nation,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_race_meta
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  OR array_contains(:compare_nations, nation_name_display)

UNION ALL

SELECT
  r.race_name,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT cg.coach_id) / NULLIF(total.cnt, 0), 2) AS coaches_pct_nation,
  'World' AS nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_fact.coach_games_fact cg
JOIN naf_catalog.gold_dim.race_dim r ON cg.race_id = r.race_id
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT coach_id) AS cnt
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_fact.coach_games_fact
) total
GROUP BY r.race_name, total.cnt

ORDER BY nation_name_display, coaches_pct_nation DESC

datasets.name: w9_opponent_elo_bins
queryLines:
SELECT
  bin_label,
  bin_index,
  games,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  ppg,
  nation_name_display
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_opponent_elo_bin_wdl_display
WHERE metric_type = :glo_metric_type
  AND nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY bin_index

datasets.name: w11_glo_exchange
queryLines:
SELECT
  opponent_nation_name_display,
  ROUND(avg_glo_exchange, 2) AS avg_glo_exchange,
  ROUND(total_glo_exchange, 1) AS total_glo_exchange
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY total_glo_exchange DESC

datasets.name: w12_nation_rivalries
queryLines:
SELECT
  rivalry_rank,
  opponent_flag_emoji,
  opponent_nation_name_display,
  games,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  ppg,
  ppg_closeness,
  avg_glo_exchange,
  total_glo_exchange
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_rivalry_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
ORDER BY rivalry_rank

datasets.name: w13_team_candidates
queryLines:
SELECT
  selector_rank,
  coach_name,
  selector_score,
  glo_pctl,
  race_pctl,
  opponent_pctl,
  glo_pctl_global,
  race_pctl_global,
  opponent_pctl_global,
  selector_score_global,
  selector_rank_global,
  glo_peak,
  glo_median,
  race_elo_median,
  avg_opponent_glo,
  form_score,
  races_above_world_median,
  world_specialist_count,
  national_specialist_count
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_team_candidates_display
WHERE nation_name_display = :nation_name_display
  AND selector_focus = :selector_focus
ORDER BY selector_rank

datasets.name: w14_power_ranking
queryLines:
SELECT
  power_rank,
  flag_emoji,
  nation_name_display,
  top_8_avg_selector_score,
  top_8_avg_selector_score_global,
  top_8_avg_glo_peak,
  top_8_avg_glo_median,
  coaches_in_top_8,
  coaches_eligible
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_power_ranking_display
WHERE selector_focus = :selector_focus
ORDER BY power_rank

datasets.name: filter_glo_metric_values
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT metric_type
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_glo_binned_distribution_display
ORDER BY metric_type

datasets.name: filter_race_values
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT race_name
FROM naf_catalog.gold_dim.race_dim
WHERE race_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY race_name

datasets.name: filter_selector_focus_values
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT selector_focus
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.nation_team_candidates_display
ORDER BY selector_focus

datasets.name: 7c4abac8
datasets.displayName: Global Nation Peak Density Aggregated Values
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM naf_catalog.gold_summary.nation_coach_glo_metrics 
WHERE nation_id = 0 AND is_valid_glo = TRUE

frame.title: Average GLO Exchange vs Other Nations
